bird.name: Sooty shrikethrush
bird.summary: The sooty shrikethrush (Colluricincla tenebrosa) is a species of bird in the family Pachycephalidae. It is found in the New Guinea Highland…

locations.name: 新幾內亞高地
locations.summary: 新几内亚高地是新幾內亞島上的山脉。其最高点为印度尼西亚境内的查亞峰，海拔4,884米（16,024英尺），同时也是大洋洲的最高峰。该山脉大致呈东西走向横贯全岛，西起印度尼西亞温达马湾县，向东一直延伸至巴布亞新幾內亞米爾恩灣省。 参考文献

relations.subject: Sooty shrikethrush
relations.evidence: It is found in the New Guinea Highlands

relations.subject: Sooty shrikethrush
relations.evidence: Its natural habitat is subtropical or tropical moist montane forests
relations.object_summary: 以成熟阔叶林和混交林为主的山地森林系统。
